name: Beouf Bourguignon (Red Wine Beef Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Coat beef cubes with flour.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
3. Brown beef cubes in hot oil, adding garlic for the last minute of cooking. Remove garlic and any excess fat.
4. Add wine and enough water to just cover the meat. Stir in bay leaf, salt, and parsley. Cover and bake for 2 hours until tender.
5. In a separate pan, fry bacon until crisp. Add onions and cook until lightly browned. Stir the cooked bacon and onions into the beef mixture. Cover and bake for about 40 minutes longer until beef is fully tender.
6. Stir in tomato paste, thyme, and pepper. Cover and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Melt butter in a 6-inch skillet. Cook and stir mushrooms over medium heat until tender. Arrange the mushrooms on top of the stew before serving.
NOTE: Beef bottom round or boneless chuck eye can be substituted for the beef rolled rump roast.
